title: Summary: Turn 3
content: Pepe memory monitoring service: runs as background thread in AgentTaskRunner, periodically checks context token utilization (threshold 0.85), triggers summarization (LLM) and local vectorization (character 3-gram hash to 256D) of conversation-turn memories, then filters by cosine similarity to current dialog, updating session.selectedMemoryIds. Integration via optional PepeService, cooling cooldown 30s, min 3 memories to trigger, only short-term conversation-turn memories summarized.
